title: Chicken & Herby Pepper Couscous
summary: This one's made with leftovers from out Roast Chicken & Peppers batch, with a simple salad with giant couscous and fresh veggies. Healthy, high-protein, and a clever use of leftover chicken.

method.description: Cook the couscous according to package instructions.
Finely mince the parsley. Zest the lemon into the yoghurt, season with salt and stir together.
Stir through the parsley, and veggies from the roast chicken into the couscous. Juice the lemon in and toss together with some of the roast juices. Taste and season with salt and pepper.
Reheat the chicken in the microwave until hot. If you don’t have a microwave tip the chicken onto a baking tray and roast at 220°C until hot, 5-10 mins.
Share the lemon yoghurt between plates, top with the chicken and serve with the couscous.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
